name: Lucent, Inc.
business: Lucent, Inc. aims to revolutionize the AI datacenter and cloud computing industry through an AI applications platform and by harnessing clean energy. The company also acquired graphite and mineral concessions in Mexico for future supply. It operates with offices in Irvine, CA and Taipei, Taiwan.
sellsTo: AI datacenter and cloud computing industry

exposures.sentence: Lucent s mission is to revolutionize the AI datacenter and cloud computing industry by AI applications platform and harnessing the power of clean energy.

On December 31, 2024, the Company entered into an Agreement for the purchase of graphite and other mineral concessions in Mexico ensuring a vital supply for the Companies future.
